languages.text: "Но это" — {n}Люссарий с заметной гордостью прикасается к челюстному импланту{/n} — "Сделано исключительно из любви к прекрасному. Ранее я увлекался поисками редких имплантов и не смог удержаться от установки... Прошу, сохраните это в секрете от {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}. Я знаю, что красные жрецы подобное не одобряют".

"But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident.{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of the thing. I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."
languages.original_text: "Но это" — {n}Люссарий с заметной гордостью прикасается к челюстному импланту{/n} — "Сделано исключительно из любви к прекрасному. Ранее я увлекался поисками редких имплантов и не смог удержаться от установки... Прошу, сохраните это в секрете от {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g}. Я знаю, что красные жрецы подобное не одобряют".

traits.locale_text: "But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of it. I used to be passionate about finding rare implants, and could not resist getting them installed... Please keep this a secret from the Adeptus Mechanicus. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

I used to be passionate about finding rare implants, and could not resist getting them installed... Please keep this a secret from the Adeptus Mechanicus. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

"But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident.{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of the thing. I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

languages.text: "Doch das hier ..." {n}Lussarius berührt mit deutlichem Stolz sein Kieferimplantat. {/n} "... habe ich nur, weil es schön fand. Ich war ein leidenschaftlicher Sammler seltener Augmentationen und konnte nicht widerstehen, sie auch einbauen zu lassen. Bitte sagt das nicht dem {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Ich weiß, die roten Priester schätzen so etwas gar nicht."
languages.original_text: "But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident.{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of the thing. I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

traits.locale_text: "Doch das hier ..." {n}Lussarius berührt mit deutlichem Stolz sein Kieferimplantat. {/n} "... habe ich nur, weil es schön fand. Ich war ein leidenschaftlicher Sammler seltener Augmentationen und konnte nicht widerstehen, sie auch einbauen zu lassen. Bitte sagt das nicht dem {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Ich weiß, die roten Priester schätzen so etwas gar nicht."

languages.text: « Quant à ceci... » {n}Lussarius touche son augmentation mandibulaire, visiblement fier.{/n} « C'était uniquement pour des raisons esthétiques. Autrefois, j'étais passionné par les augmétiques rares. Je ne pouvais pas résister à l'envie de m'en faire installer... Je vous en prie, ne dites rien à l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Je sais que les prêtres rouges n'approuvent pas ce genre de pratiques. »
languages.original_text: "But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident.{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of the thing. I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

traits.locale_text: « Quant à ceci... » {n}Lussarius touche son augmentation mandibulaire, visiblement fier.{/n} « C'était uniquement pour des raisons esthétiques. Autrefois, j'étais passionné par les augmétiques rares. Je ne pouvais pas résister à l'envie de m'en faire installer... Je vous en prie, ne dites rien à l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Je sais que les prêtres rouges n'approuvent pas ce genre de pratiques. »

languages.text: “不过这个——”{n}卢萨利乌斯指着下巴上的植入物，带着明显自豪的表情开了口。{/n}“——就纯粹出于审美喜好了。以前，我非常热衷于寻找稀有的植入物，还会忍不住把这些东西安在身上……这件事情还希望您能向{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}保密，我知道，那些红袍神甫绝对不会容忍这种行为。”
languages.original_text: "But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident.{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of the thing. I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

traits.locale_text: “不过这个——”{n}卢萨利乌斯指着下巴上的植入物，带着明显自豪的表情开了口。{/n}“——就纯粹出于审美喜好了。以前，我非常热衷于寻找稀有的植入物，还会忍不住把这些东西安在身上……这件事情还希望您能向机械修会保密，我知道，那些红袍神甫绝对不会容忍这种行为。”

languages.text: «Pero esto...». {n}Lussarius se toca el implante de barbilla, claramente orgulloso.{/n} «Esto fue puramente por su belleza. Antes me apasionaban los auméticos raros y no podía evitar la tentación de instalármelos... Por favor, no se lo diga al {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Sé que los sacerdotes rojos no lo ven con buenos ojos».
languages.original_text: "But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident.{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of the thing. I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

traits.locale_text: «Pero esto...». {n}Lussarius se toca el implante de barbilla, claramente orgulloso.{/n} «Esto fue puramente por su belleza. Antes me apasionaban los auméticos raros y no podía evitar la tentación de instalármelos... Por favor, no se lo diga al {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Sé que los sacerdotes rojos no lo ven con buenos ojos».

languages.text: 「ですが、これ…」{n}ルッサリウスは自慢げに顎のインプラントに触れた。{/n}「…これは純粋に美しさのためだけのものです。かつては珍しいオーグメティックを見つけることに情熱を燃やしていて、どうしても取り付けずにはいられなかったのです…どうかこのことは{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}帝国技術局{/g}には内緒にしてください。赤の司祭たちはこういうことを許さないと知っていますから」
languages.original_text: "But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident.{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of the thing. I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."

traits.locale_text: 「ですが、これ…」{n}ルッサリウスは自慢げに顎のインプラントに触れた。{/n}「…これは純粋に美しさのためだけのものです。かつては珍しいオーグメティックを見つけることに情熱を燃やしていて、どうしても取り付けずにはいられなかったのです…どうかこのことは{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}帝国技術局{/g}には内緒にしてください。赤の司祭たちはこういうことを許さないと知っていますから」

languages.text: "Ama şu..." {n}Lussarius, gururlu bir tavırla çene implantına dokunuyor.{/n} "Tamamen estetik sebeplerden yaptırdım. Eskiden nadir ogmetikleri bulmaya takıntılıydım ve taktırmadan duramadım. Lütfen bunu {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}'a söylemeyin. Kızıl rahipler böyle şeyleri hiç hoş karşılamaz."
languages.original_text: "But this—" {n}Lussarius touches his jaw implant, his pride very evident.{/n} "—this was purely for the beauty of the thing. I used to be passionate about finding rare augmetics, and could not resist having them installed... Please keep this a secret from the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I know the red priests don't condone things like that."
